upgrade_source: MTA press release: Avenue H Station on Q Line Now Fully Accessible; Brooklyn Paper
notes: ADA accessibility achieved via ramps (not elevators) due to ground-level station with landmarked 1906 wooden station house. Southbound ramp completed September 2011; northbound ramp completed June 2021. Full ADA compliance achieved 2021. First completed ADA project from the 2020-2024 Capital Plan. Total cost $18 million including $12.2 million for construction.
